cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which penguin is the oldest. So first, I need to look at the data provided. The table has penguins with their name, age, height, and weight. The original penguins are Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. Then they add James and delete Bernard. The question asks for the oldest penguin after these changes. Let me list out the ages first. Originally: - Louis is 7 - Bernard is 5 - Vincent is 9 - Gwen is 8 Then they add James who is 12. Then they delete Bernard. So Bernard is no longer in the list. The remaining penguins are Louis, Vincent, Gwen, and James. So their ages are: - Louis: 7 - Vincent: 9 - Gwen: 8 - James: 12 So James is the oldest with 12 years old. The options
